---
title: "DaMIfLL Presents at IAT Kickoff Meeting"
date: "2025-01-20"
categories: [presentation, IAT, outreach]
description: "Members of the DaMIfLL working group presented the initiative at the IAT kickoff meeting, introducing our goals and activities to the broader community."
---

Members of the DaMIfLL working group attended and presented at the IAT kickoff meeting.
The presentation introduced the DaMIfLL initiative, outlined our working group structure,
and highlighted ongoing efforts to improve data management and interoperability in land
use and landscape research.

We look forward to continued collaboration with the IAT community.
